args.text: Retention rules checked. Fernwood Ltd has no active legal hold. Exports to be held 30 days, then deletion per retention policy.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The data export manifest for Fernwood Ltd has been prepared. All datasets have been confirmed and are ready for export.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: As per the termination of your Halcyon contract effective 30 April, your access has been revoked. Please contact accounts@fernwood.example for billing inquiries.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 for the unused portion of your Halcyon subscription following contract termination on 30 April.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to order ORD-3320. Notification sent to accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: The deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd has been confirmed. Data will be held until 2026-08-16 and permanently deleted on 2026-08-17 per retention policy.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd account offboarding has been completed successfully. All data exports prepared, access revoked, refund processed, and deletion scheduled.
